summary: Completed testing of P0 Super Admin Unified User Management and P1 Dynamic Agency Navigation features. All backend APIs pass (9 endpoints tested). Frontend UI tests pass for Admin All Users page, Admin Agency Modules page, and agency user sidebar filtering.
passed_tests: ✅ P0: GET /api/admin/all-users - returns 200 with 3 users, each having agency_name field
✅ P0: GET /api/admin/all-users - returns 401 without auth
✅ P0: GET /api/admin/all-users - returns 401 for agency user (role check)
✅ P0: PATCH /api/admin/agencies/{id}/users/{uid} - role change works (agency_admin <-> agency_agent)
✅ P0: PATCH /api/admin/agencies/{id}/users/{uid} - status toggle works (active <-> disabled)
✅ P1: GET /api/agency/profile - returns agency_id, name, allowed_modules for agency user
✅ P1: GET /api/admin/agencies/{id}/modules - returns agency_name and allowed_modules array
✅ P1: PUT /api/admin/agencies/{id}/modules - saves and returns updated allowed_modules
✅ P0: Frontend Admin All Users page loads at /app/admin/all-users
✅ P0: Admin All Users - search input (data-testid='user-search') present
✅ P0: Admin All Users - agency filter dropdown (data-testid='agency-filter') present
✅ P0: Admin All Users - status filter dropdown (data-testid='status-filter') present
✅ P0: Admin All Users - 3 user rows displayed with role dropdowns and status toggle buttons
✅ P0: Admin All Users - agency name links navigate to per-agency user page
✅ P0: Sidebar shows 'Kullanici Yonetimi' under YONETIM group
✅ P0: Sidebar shows 'Acente Modulleri' under YONETIM group
✅ P1: Frontend Agency Modules page loads at /app/admin/agency-modules
✅ P1: Agency Modules - 3 agency cards displayed
✅ P1: Agency Modules - 22 module toggle checkboxes in expanded view
✅ P1: Agency Modules - 'Tumunu Sec' and 'Tumunu Kaldir' buttons present
✅ P1: Agency Modules - 'Kaydet' save button present
✅ P1: Dynamic Agency Navigation - Agency user sees filtered sidebar based on allowed_modules
✅ P1: Dynamic Agency Navigation - Admin-only items correctly hidden for agency user
critical_code_review_comments: AppShell.jsx correctly fetches /api/agency/profile for agency users and filters sidebar items based on allowed_modules (lines 327-340, 456-458)
AdminAllUsersPage.jsx correctly implements search, agency filter, status filter, role dropdown, and status toggle with proper data-testid attributes
AdminAgencyModulesPage.jsx properly loads agencies and provides checkbox UI for module selection with save functionality
all_users_router endpoint correctly joins agency_name from agencies collection for each user
seed_data_creation: None needed - used existing Demo Acenta and Demo Acente A agencies
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 and P1 features fully tested. Admin All Users page shows unified view of all agency users across agencies with role/status management. Agency Modules admin page allows configuring which sidebar items each agency can see. Agency user sidebar dynamically filters based on allowed_modules from /api/agency/profile. Demo Acenta has allowed_modules=['dashboard','rezervasyonlar','sheet_baglantilari','musaitlik_takibi']. Note: Login endpoint has aggressive rate limiting (5 min cooldown after multiple requests).

api_verification.GET /api/admin/all-users: ✅ 200 - Returns list of agency users with agency_name populated
api_verification.PATCH /api/admin/agencies/{id}/users/{ui: ✅ 200 - Changes role between agency_admin and agency_agent
✅ 200 - Toggles status between active and disabled
api_verification.PUT /api/admin/agencies/{id}/modules: ✅ 200 - Saves allowed_modules and returns updated data

frontend_verification.User table: 3 rows with role dropdowns and status toggle buttons
frontend_verification.Sidebar items: 'Kullanici Yonetimi' and 'Acente Modulleri' visible under YONETIM
frontend_verification.Module toggles: 22 checkboxes in groups (TEMEL, MUSTERI ILISKILERI, B2B AG, FINANS, OPERASYON)
frontend_verification.Agency user sidebar: Correctly filtered - shows only allowed modules, hides admin items
